_readme: Seed data for the mtg_conditional_keywords table. Each row is a Magic keyword ability (CR 702) or ability word (CR 207.2c) that has a CONDITION that must be met for its effect/value, plus a recommendation_metric used to decide whether a deck should be recommended a card carrying that term. metric_key is a machine-readable deck signal (see _metric_keys), metric_threshold is a suggested minimum count of that signal in the deck to justify recommending the card. Unconditional evergreen statics (flying, deathtouch, trample, etc.) and pure mana-only alternative costs are intentionally excluded. Source: MagicCompRules 20260417.pdf.

_metric_keys.instant_sorcery_count: number of instant/sorcery cards in the deck
_metric_keys.noncreature_spell_count: number of noncreature spells (instants, sorceries, artifacts, enchantments, planeswalkers)
_metric_keys.cheap_spell_count: number of spells with mana value <= 2 (for chaining multiple per turn)
_metric_keys.cast_from_non_hand_count: cards that can be cast from graveyard/exile/library (flashback, foretell, adventure, etc.)
_metric_keys.targeted_spell_count: cheap instants/sorceries/auras that target your own creatures
_metric_keys.artifact_count: number of artifacts in the deck
_metric_keys.enchantment_count: number of enchantments (incl. Rooms/Auras) in the deck
_metric_keys.creature_count: number of creatures in the deck
_metric_keys.token_makers: permanents/spells that create creature or nonland tokens
_metric_keys.tribal_count: creatures sharing the relevant creature type (type named in condition)
_metric_keys.land_count: total lands plus extra-land-drop and fetch effects
_metric_keys.basic_land_type_sources: distinct basic land types available across your mana base
_metric_keys.color_count: number of colors in the deck's mana base / identity
_metric_keys.single_color_pip_bias: 1 if the deck is mono/heavily one color, else 0
_metric_keys.graveyard_fillers: effects that put YOUR cards into YOUR graveyard — self-mill, discard/looting outlets, and sacrifice outlets (excludes recursion/reanimation, which use the graveyard rather than fill it, and opponent-facing mill)
_metric_keys.graveyard_creature_payload: creature cards expected in the graveyard
_metric_keys.graveyard_spell_payload: instant/sorcery cards expected in the graveyard
_metric_keys.discard_outlets: effects that let you discard cards from hand at will
_metric_keys.sac_outlets: sacrifice outlets and effects that make your permanents leave the battlefield
_metric_keys.low_life_payoffs: deck intentionally operates at low life / pays life
_metric_keys.empty_hand_enablers: low curve + draw-less aggression that empties the hand
_metric_keys.aggro_attackers: creatures expected to attack each turn (aggressive board)
_metric_keys.evasive_creatures: creatures with evasion or that connect reliably
_metric_keys.poison_payoffs: infect/toxic creatures + proliferate, aiming at 10 poison
_metric_keys.commander_present: Commander format with a commander available in the command zone
_metric_keys.multiple_copies: deck can run 4+ copies of the same card (non-singleton)
_metric_keys.tapped_creature_enablers: ways to have creatures tapped on your turn (attacking/tap effects)
_metric_keys.speed_enablers: Start Your Engines! decks that make opponents lose life to reach max speed
_metric_keys.big_x_payoffs: ramp / big-mana to fuel large X costs
_metric_keys.ramp_sources: mana ramp and rituals to afford extra costs
_metric_keys.always: no deck-composition gate; recommend broadly when the rider is relevant

terms.condition: At least three mana of the same color was spent to cast this spell.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in mono-color or single-color-heavy decks that can reliably spend three of one color.

terms.condition: You cast this spell during your main phase.
terms.recommendation_metric: No deck synergy needed; recommend broadly — you only have to cast it at sorcery speed to get the bonus.

terms.condition: Another creature you control enters the battlefield.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature- and token-dense decks where creatures keep entering.

terms.condition: This creature and at least two other creatures attack.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide aggressive decks able to attack with three or more creatures.

terms.condition: Discard this card to give an attacking creature a combat bonus (needs an attacking creature to target).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive creature decks that consistently have an attacker on board.

terms.condition: Two or more nonland permanents entered the battlefield under your control this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in low-curve / token decks that can deploy multiple permanents per turn.

terms.condition: Discard this card from your hand to use its alternative effect.
terms.recommendation_metric: No deck synergy needed; recommend broadly as a flexible from-hand option.

terms.condition: Counts the number of mana symbols of a given color among the relevant cards.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in mono/heavy single-color decks with dense colored pips.

terms.condition: Tap this creature and another untapped Ally you control to activate.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Ally tribal decks with a high Ally count.

terms.condition: An enchantment you control enters the battlefield.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in enchantment (enchantress) decks with a high enchantment count.

terms.condition: Effect scales with the number of colors of mana spent to cast the spell.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in 3+ color decks with good fixing so you spend many colors.

terms.condition: As it enters or attacks, each player votes; the effect depends on the vote.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer / Commander (politics) games.

terms.condition: You control three or more creatures with different powers.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks with a varied power spread (avoid all-same-stat token swarms).

terms.condition: Four or more card types are among cards in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks with self-mill and a diverse card-type mix (instant, sorcery, creature, land, artifact, enchantment).

terms.condition: Four or more permanent cards are in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks that bin permanent cards (self-mill, sacrifice, fetch).

terms.condition: Eight or more permanent cards are in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in dedicated, heavy graveyard decks that fill the yard fast.

terms.condition: A permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats / blink / token decks with sacrifice outlets and fetch effects.

terms.condition: Effect scales with the number of basic land types among lands you control.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in multicolor / 5-color decks running many basic land types and dual/typed lands.

terms.condition: An enchantment you control enters, or you fully unlock a Room.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in enchantment/Room decks with a high enchantment count.

terms.condition: Works while your commander is in the command zone or on the battlefield.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Commander decks built around this commander's tribe/theme.

terms.condition: This creature is dealt damage.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with high-toughness creatures and ways to ping/damage your own creatures.

terms.condition: You have 5 or less life.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive or life-as-resource decks comfortable operating at low life.

terms.condition: Effect scales with the number of permanent cards in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks that reliably bin permanent cards (descend payoffs).

terms.condition: You control a creature with power 4 or greater.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in midrange/stompy decks with a critical mass of big creatures.

terms.condition: You cast your second spell each turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with many cheap spells to chain two+ per turn.

terms.condition: Creatures you control have total power 8 or greater.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide or go-big creature decks that amass 8+ total power.

terms.condition: Discard another card with the same name to activate.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in non-singleton formats where you can run multiple copies; never in Commander.

terms.condition: You have no cards in hand.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in low-curve aggro or discard decks that empty their hand quickly.

terms.condition: You cast a spell that targets this creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in auras/pump (Voltron) decks with a high density of cheap spells that target your own creatures.

terms.condition: Exile a card to imprint it; the ability then references the exiled card.
terms.recommendation_metric: Mostly self-contained; recommend broadly, stronger when you can supply a good card to imprint.

terms.condition: You gained life this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in lifegain decks with repeatable life-gain triggers.

terms.condition: This creature becomes untapped.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that tap then untap creatures (attack + untap, tap effects).

terms.condition: Starting with you, each player may pay mana; the effect scales with the total paid.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer games.

terms.condition: At the beginning of your upkeep, the top card of your library shares a creature type with this creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tribal decks with a very high count of the shared creature type.

terms.condition: A land enters the battlefield under your control.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with a high land count plus extra-land-drops and fetch effects.

terms.condition: You control your commander.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Commander decks that keep the commander on the battlefield.

terms.condition: You cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with a high instant/sorcery count (and copy effects).

terms.condition: You control three or more artifacts.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in artifact decks that reliably keep 3+ artifacts on board.

terms.condition: A creature died this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with sacrifice outlets, fodder, and removal to ensure a death each turn.

terms.condition: You cast an instant or sorcery spell (bonus effect if five or more mana was spent on it).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with instant/sorcery density and access to bigger spells.

terms.condition: You attacked this combat with creatures with total power 6 or greater.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive creature decks that establish a strong attacking board.

terms.condition: You cast a spell from a zone other than your hand (graveyard, exile, library, etc.).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that cast from non-hand zones (flashback, foretell, adventure, cascade, plot).

terms.condition: Each player reveals the top card of their library; the effect scales with the reveal.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer games (more players = bigger effect).

terms.condition: Affects target creature and every other creature that shares a color with it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in mono-color creature decks to maximize the shared-color spread.

terms.condition: You attacked with a creature this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that attack before casting the raid card.

terms.condition: This or another Ally you control enters the battlefield.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Ally tribal decks with a high Ally count.

terms.condition: Activate from your graveyard, exiling this card from the graveyard as part of the cost (sorcery speed).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that get creatures into the graveyard and want counter payoffs.

terms.condition: You cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with many creature-targeting instants/sorceries.

terms.condition: A permanent you controlled left the battlefield this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with fetchlands, sacrifice outlets, tokens, or blink to trigger it on demand.

terms.condition: All players vote secretly; the effect depends on the vote.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer / Commander games.

terms.condition: Two or more instant and/or sorcery cards are in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks that fill the graveyard with instants/sorceries.

terms.condition: The spell costs more for each target beyond the first.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide creature decks (many targets) with mana to spare.

terms.condition: At the beginning of your second main phase, this creature is tapped.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that attack/tap creatures each turn (vigilance and tap synergies help).

terms.condition: Return any number of lands of a type you control to hand; the effect scales with the number returned.
terms.recommendation_metric: Niche; recommend only where the one-shot payoff outweighs bouncing your own lands.

terms.condition: You get an effect; each opponent may take a lesser copy, and for each who does you get more.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer games.

terms.condition: Seven or more cards are in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks with self-mill/looting to reach seven cards quickly.

terms.condition: Effect scales with the number of creature cards in your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks where creatures die / are milled, building a creature-rich graveyard.

terms.condition: This creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with cheap spells/abilities that target your own creatures.

terms.condition: Effect scales with the number of colors among permanents you control.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in multicolor decks that field permanents of many colors.

terms.condition: A nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn, or a spell was warped this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in sacrifice/removal/warp decks that reliably remove a nonland permanent each turn.

terms.condition: Each player votes; the effect depends on the vote.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer / Commander (politics) games.

terms.condition: This creature becomes blocked by more than one creature (+N/+N per blocker beyond the first).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive single-big-threat decks that bait multi-blocks.

terms.condition: Cast the card from your graveyard by paying its flashback cost (then it is exiled).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger/graveyard decks that want extra value from instants/sorceries.

terms.condition: You discard this card; you may then cast it for its madness cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with discard outlets and looting to enable the discard at will.

terms.condition: As it enters, reveal cards from hand sharing its creature type to add +1/+1 counters.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tribal decks with a high count of the shared creature type in hand.

terms.condition: Copy the spell for each other spell cast before it this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in combo/ritual decks built to cast many cheap spells in one turn.

terms.condition: Costs {1} less for each [thing] (usually artifact) you control.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in artifact decks that flood the board with cheap artifacts.

terms.condition: On death, move its +1/+1 counters onto target artifact creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in artifact-creature decks that can receive the counters.

terms.condition: Enters with a counter for each color of mana spent to cast it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in 3+ color decks with strong fixing to spend many colors.

terms.condition: On death, return a Spirit card of mana value N or less from your graveyard to hand.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Spirit tribal decks that fill the graveyard with Spirits.

terms.condition: Reveal from hand as you cast a [quality] (usually Arcane) spell to add its text.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with a high density of the spliceable spell type (e.g., Arcane).

terms.condition: Sacrifice a [quality] permanent to cast at instant speed for a reduced cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tribal decks of the offered type with expendable bodies.

terms.condition: Return an unblocked attacking creature you control to hand to put this in tapped and attacking.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tempo decks with cheap evasive attackers to connect, then swap.

terms.condition: Tap untapped creatures you control to help pay the spell's cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide creature/token decks that can tap many bodies.

terms.condition: Instead of drawing, mill N and return this card from your graveyard to hand.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks that want to bin cards and reuse them.

terms.condition: Enters with +1/+1 counters if an opponent was dealt damage this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that deal early damage before deploying these.

terms.condition: On death (or resolution), exile it haunting a creature for a delayed effect.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in value/aristocrats decks that don't mind a two-stage payoff.

terms.condition: Pay the replicate cost any number of times to copy the spell that many times.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with mana/rituals to copy repeatedly.

terms.condition: When another creature enters, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this onto it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks with frequent creatures entering and counter synergies.

terms.condition: When a creature is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, pay to return this from graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats decks where creatures die regularly.

terms.condition: On cast, reveal top N; cast revealed cards with the same name for free.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in non-singleton decks running multiple copies.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks and isn't blocked, it gets +N/+0.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that push unblocked damage.

terms.condition: Copy the spell for each permanent put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in sacrifice/aristocrats decks that cause many deaths per turn.

terms.condition: On enter, exile another [object/tribe] you control or sacrifice this.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tribal decks that can spare a body to champion.

terms.condition: Cast for its evoke cost, then sacrifice it on entry (one-shot ETB).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks valuing the ETB and with sacrifice/recursion synergy.

terms.condition: Pay the prowl cost if a player was dealt combat damage this turn by a creature sharing this spell's type.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in evasive tribal (Rogue/Faerie) aggro decks.

terms.condition: Tap two untapped creatures sharing a color with the spell to copy it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature-heavy decks whose creatures match the spell's colors.

terms.condition: On death with no -1/-1 counters, returns with a -1/-1 counter.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats/blink decks that repeatedly sacrifice it.

terms.condition: Cast from your graveyard by discarding a land card as an additional cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in land-heavy decks with surplus lands and lands-matter synergy.

terms.condition: As it enters, sacrifice any number of creatures to add +1/+1 counters per creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in token/go-wide decks with expendable creatures to feed it.

terms.condition: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, it gets +1/+1.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Voltron / single-attacker decks rather than go-wide.

terms.condition: On cast, exile from the top until a lower-mana-value nonland card, then cast it free.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with a low-curve nonland base so cascade hits real spells.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, defending player sacrifices N permanents.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in ramp decks that reliably cast and attack with the big threat.

terms.condition: Cast cheaply if it is the first card you drew this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with top-of-library control and extra-draw timing.

terms.condition: On enter (or when another enters), pair with another unpaired creature you control.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks that keep a steady stream of bodies to pair.

terms.condition: Encode on a creature; recast the spell free when that creature deals combat damage to a player.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with evasive creatures that connect reliably.

terms.condition: When a creature with greater power/toughness enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks with an ascending power/toughness curve.

terms.condition: Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {W/B} to drain each opponent.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spell-dense decks with mana to spare each turn.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks the player with the most life, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in multiplayer aggro decks attacking the life leader.

terms.condition: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with a high noncreature spell count.

terms.condition: Cast for its dash cost to give it haste, returning it to hand at end of turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive tempo decks wanting immediate attacks.

terms.condition: When it enters, you may sacrifice a creature for an effect.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats decks with fodder (tokens) and death payoffs.

terms.condition: When it deals combat damage to a player, it gets +1/+1 counters and becomes renowned.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that push early combat damage.

terms.condition: Pay the awaken cost to animate a land you control with +1/+1 counters.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in lands-matter or ramp decks with mana to pay the awaken cost.

terms.condition: Whenever this deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive 'process' decks that connect and exploit exiled cards.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, create attacking copies, one for each other opponent.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in multiplayer games.

terms.condition: Pay the surge cost if you or a teammate cast another spell this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spell-dense decks (or team multiplayer) that cast multiple spells per turn.

terms.condition: Cast by sacrificing a creature plus a cost reduced by the sacrificed creature's mana value.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with expendable/token creatures to sacrifice for the cost.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, it gets +1/+1 for each opponent you attacked this combat.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in multiplayer aggro decks that attack multiple opponents.

terms.condition: Tap creatures with total power N or greater to make the Vehicle a creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with enough creatures/total power to crew reliably.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on a smaller attacking creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide aggro decks with smaller attackers to grow.

terms.condition: Cast from your graveyard by discarding a card as an additional cost (then exile it).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger decks with card surplus to discard.

terms.condition: When this dies, create N 1/1 flying Spirit tokens.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats/token decks that sacrifice it for value.

terms.condition: Pay the spectacle cost if an opponent lost life this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive/ping decks that chip away at opponents early.

terms.condition: Cast from your graveyard by paying its escape cost and exiling other cards from your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks that fill the yard to fuel repeated escapes.

terms.condition: You get the city's blessing once you control ten or more permanents.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide permanent-dense decks that reach 10 permanents.

terms.condition: Cast for its mutate cost onto a non-Human creature you own.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks with non-Human bodies to mutate onto.

terms.condition: Activate only if this creature attacked this turn (and only once per turn).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that attack with this creature each turn.

terms.condition: As an additional cost, sacrifice a creature with power N or greater to copy the spell.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with expendable creatures of sufficient power (tokens, aristocrats).

terms.condition: As it attacks, tap another untapped creature you control to add its power.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in go-wide creature decks with spare untapped attackers.

terms.condition: Enters with X +1/+1 counters; draw a card if X is 5 or more.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in ramp / big-mana decks able to pay large X.

terms.condition: On enter, put +1/+1 counters on a creature; if another creature, it also gains this creature's abilities.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in creature decks with good targets to back up.

terms.condition: As an additional cost, you may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that generate tokens/artifacts/enchantments to bargain away.

terms.condition: Exile this plus the listed materials (from permanents and/or your graveyard) to transform it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that can supply the craft materials (artifacts/creatures/graveyard cards).

terms.condition: Pay the freerunning cost if a player took combat damage this turn from an Assassin or your commander.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in Assassin tribal or commander-damage aggro decks.

terms.condition: Pay an additional cost to create a 1/1 token copy when it enters.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in token / go-wide decks with extra mana to pay offspring.

terms.condition: Cast from your graveyard by paying its cost and tapping a creature (cost reduced by its power).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks with creatures to tap and spells to recur.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, create N tapped, attacking Warrior tokens (sacrificed end of turn).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive go-wide decks that benefit from extra attackers and death triggers.

terms.condition: Cast from your graveyard if you discarded this card this turn.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks with discard outlets and looting.

terms.condition: Cast for its cost by returning a tapped creature you control to hand.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in decks that tap creatures (attacking) and want to reuse ETB value.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, add N red mana that persists until end of combat.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive red decks that attack then spend the ramped mana.

terms.condition: Cast during your declare blockers step by returning an unblocked creature to hand; it enters attacking.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in tempo decks with evasive attackers to bounce.

terms.condition: Whenever you cast a spell costing more mana than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in midrange decks that cast a steady stream of spells.

terms.condition: Exile cards from your graveyard to pay for generic mana in the cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks that bank cards to discount these spells.

terms.condition: Exile this card from your graveyard and pay a cost to add +1/+1 counters to a creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in +1/+1 counter decks with creatures hitting the graveyard.

terms.condition: Tap untapped artifacts you control to pay for generic mana in the cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in artifact decks with many cheap artifacts to tap.

terms.condition: Exile this card from your graveyard and pay a cost to create a token copy.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in token/graveyard value decks.

terms.condition: Exile this card from your graveyard and pay a cost to create a 4/4 token copy.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in token/graveyard value decks.

terms.condition: Exile this card from your graveyard and pay a cost to make attacking token copies, one per opponent.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard decks, stronger in multiplayer.

terms.condition: Pay a cost to return this card from your graveyard with haste (exiled at end of turn).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive graveyard decks reusing cheap creatures.

terms.condition: Cast the back face from your graveyard by paying its disturb cost.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in graveyard value decks (spirits/enchantments).

terms.condition: Cast the aftermath half only from your graveyard.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in spellslinger/graveyard decks wanting two-for-one value.

terms.condition: Can't block; sacrifice it after it attacks.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats/token decks that turn its forced death into value.

terms.condition: On death with no +1/+1 counters, return it with a +1/+1 counter.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aristocrats/blink decks that repeatedly sacrifice it.

terms.condition: Tap and pay (sorcery speed) to put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in +1/+1 counter / go-wide decks with counter payoffs.

terms.condition: Deals damage as -1/-1 counters to creatures and poison counters to players (10 poison wins).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend only in dedicated infect/poison decks with proliferate and pump.

terms.condition: Combat damage to a player also gives that player N poison counters (10 poison wins).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in poison decks with multiple toxic creatures and proliferate.

terms.condition: When it deals combat damage to a player, that player gets N poison counters.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in poison decks supported by proliferate.

terms.condition: Sets your speed to 1; speed climbs as opponents lose life on your turns (max speed 4).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks that make opponents lose life every turn to reach max speed.

terms.condition: The granted ability is active only while your speed is 4 (max speed).
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend alongside Start Your Engines! enablers that quickly reach max speed.

terms.condition: Whenever this and a higher-power creature attack together, put a +1/+1 counter on this.
terms.recommendation_metric: Recommend in aggressive decks with at least one bigger attacker alongside.

terms.condition: Whenever this attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0.
